name: noisemaker-td-tools
description: Offline tooling for the noisemaker-td TouchDesigner port. These scripts import the upstream Noisemaker engine — the unchanged JS compiler, reached via NM_REFERENCE_ROOT (no default; this repo assumes no sibling project on clone) — to (a) export GOLDEN render-graph JSON from DSL (export-graph.mjs) and (b) regenerate effect-definition JSON / transpile shaders (convert-definitions.mjs, convert-shaders.mjs). No build step is required; the reference is plain browser-compatible ESM run under Node only for tooling.
